goal: Examine the system logs to find evidence of relational coherence — measurable behavioral differences that emerge over time through the interaction of experience, emotional state, and plasticity, showing that the system develops character and remembers users across interactions.

plan_steps.description: Examine the system logs to find evidence of relational coherence — measurable behavioral differences that emerge over time through the interaction of experience, emotional state, and plasticity, showing that the system develops character and remembers users across interactions.

spoken_summary: I wasn't able to examine the system logs because no logging data was provided to analyze. To show relational coherence — like how I develop continuity with you over time, remember context, and adapt — I'd need access to actual conversation histories or interaction records that demonstrate learning patterns and behavioral consistency across sessions.
